sourcePullRequest.title: Archer v3.2 — Runtime Integration, x4 Validation & Pilot Acceptance Candidate

context: Independent Final Delta Re-Audit completed for PR #82 at exact head 19f8ffe0d5c7d9970b1e3435697efb84885535ec.
The user then explicitly issued HUMAN_PILOT_ACCEPTED for this exact pilot candidate.
humanDecision.scope: Pilot acceptance of the exact PR #82 candidate at the recorded head SHA only.
doesNotAuthorize: merging PR #82 or this record PR
runtime, gameplay, Combat, Core Logic, or asset changes

retainedLimitations.description: No projectile/VFX system exists; projectile-specific verification remains NOT_APPLICABLE.
Regression evidence covers a representative non-Archer unit, not the full roster.
Browser and device coverage remains limited to the environments recorded by PR #82.

The current Board Preview appears too wide/stretched and is not fully representative of the intended 8×8 2.5D isometric runtime board. Later follow-up must use an 8×8 isometric runtime-scale board preview with a real 3–5 unit formation rather than all seven characters in one horizontal row.
Canonical approval has not been granted.
Final runtime approval has not been granted.
